title: Saplings to Sticks
description: Adds a recipe to turn any sapling into a stick
body:
Adds a recipe to turn any sapling (vanilla or modded) into a stick.

A neat addition if you have too many saplings cluttering your inventory.

![image of new recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/708b301d72eb9c280f9d60b0bcba77cf15c18ba7.png)
